steps.title: Undo the multiplication
steps.content:
The expression $3x-4$ is multiplied by $6$. Divide both sides by $6$ to get an equivalent equation.
$$\frac{6(3x-4)}{6}=\frac{72}{6}$$
$$3x-4=12$$

steps.title: Match the equivalent equation
steps.content: The equation with the same solution is $3x-4=12$. The answer is A.
